categories.name: Paper Cutter
categories.description: Tara Maa Solutions paper cutters cover the full range from manual lever guillotines for A4/A3 trimming to programmable hydraulic and servo-driven cutters for high-volume print, packaging and binding units. Precise clamping, accurate back-gauge control and safety features make them suited to print shops, photo-album makers and commercial offset printers.

categories.name: Glue Binder
categories.description: Perfect (glue) binding machines for producing professional softcover books, notebooks, diaries, brochures and catalogues. The range spans compact desktop hot-melt binders to semi-automatic and fully automatic cover-feeding perfect binders with milling, side-glue and clamping for strong, durable spines.

categories.name: Roll Laminator
categories.description: Thermal and cold roll laminators for laminating book covers, posters, certificates, charts and offset/digital prints. Options include table-top single/double-side laminators, pneumatic auto-feed/auto-cut models and large hydraulic oil-heated laminators for medium and large enterprises.

categories.name: Paper Creasing Machine
categories.description: Creasing and perforating machines that produce clean fold lines on covers, cards, invitations and cartons without cracking. The range runs from manual and foot-operated creasers to electric and fully digital auto-feed creasing/perforating machines with touch-screen programmes.

categories.name: Die Cutting Machine
categories.description: Digital and rotary die-cutting, label-cutting and half-cut machines for stickers, labels, cards, cartons and packaging prototypes. Auto-feed plotters with kiss-cut, full-cut, creasing and contour-cutting suit on-demand label and short-run packaging production.

categories.name: Folding Machine
categories.description: Automatic paper folding machines for leaflets, brochures, invoices, pharma inserts and booklets. Friction/pile feed with single, double, letter, gate and cross-fold modes deliver fast, accurate folding for print finishing and mailing.

categories.name: Riding Stapler
categories.description: Electric riding (saddle) staplers and wire stitchers for making booklets, magazines, catalogues and exercise books. Flat and saddle stitching modes with foot-switch operation give fast, neat booklet production for print and bindery shops.

categories.name: Corner Cutter
categories.description: Round corner cutters and rounding machines for trimming smooth, rounded corners on visiting cards, PVC/ID cards, photos, books and albums. Manual lever and electric/pneumatic models handle single cards to thick stacks for card studios and finishing units.

categories.name: Slitting Machine
categories.description: Paper and roll slitting machines for cutting rolls and sheets into narrower strips and rolls. Multi-blade rotary slitters suit labels, paper rolls, thermal paper and converting applications with adjustable widths and high running speeds.

categories.name: Foil Stamp Machine
categories.description: Hot foil stamping and digital gold-foil printing machines for adding metallic and pigment foil to invitations, book covers, certificates, lanyards and packaging. Plate-based hot stamping and plateless digital foil printers cover both traditional and on-demand foiling.
